what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment, linking attachment id att-65c15de0 to a board item target via type board_items.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-c4bad36c
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
standouts: board:// URI scheme for target reference
conventions: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
concerns: No payload or context describing what is attached
Target URI cannot be resolved from this file alone
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that ties a dragnet-development attachment to a board item without carrying the attached content.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment represent?
Who or what created this attachment?
What is the semantic role of board item item-c4bad36c?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is a board_items attachment record; the file matches that purpose but contains only the reference, not the attached material.
intention_signals: To create a durable, typed, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a board item for later lookup or fusion.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed edge between an attachment identifier and a board item, supporting retrieval and provenance without embedding the payload.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata file att-65c15de0 in the dragnet-development channel records a board_items link to board item item-c4bad36c with an added timestamp and no body content.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a typed, timestamped association from a channel attachment to a board item.
